title: Q-MAC HF Modem
short description: The Q-MAC HF Modem is a military modem developed by Q-MAC (acquired by Barrett Communications). It uses OFDM with a BPSK sync channel in a gap of the signal.
description: The **Q-MAC HF Modem** is a military modem developed by Q-MAC (acquired by Barrett Communications). It uses OFDM with a BPSK sync channel in a gap of the signal. This mode is used in Q-MAC modems and transceivers and supports the transmission of encrypted data and digital voice.
